pages.text: My name is Tumi and I am scared.

blocks.text: My name is Tumi and I am scared.

pages.text: Mama says it’s okay to be scared. “Everybody gets scared.”

blocks.text: Mama says it’s okay to be scared. “Everybody gets scared.”

pages.text: What if there is a monster under my bed?

blocks.text: What if there is a monster under my bed?

pages.text: “Then I will tell it to go away and NEVER come back.”

blocks.text: “Then I will tell it to go away and NEVER come back.”

pages.text: What if there are eyes in the bath tub drain?

blocks.text: What if there are eyes in the bath tub drain?

pages.text: “Then your big sister, Kamo, will pull you out of the bath.”

blocks.text: “Then your big sister, Kamo, will pull you out of the bath.”

pages.text: What if a whale swallows me at the beach?

blocks.text: What if a whale swallows me at the beach?

pages.text: “Then Kamo and I will swim into the whale’s mouth to rescue you.”

blocks.text: “Then Kamo and I will swim into the whale’s mouth to rescue you.”

pages.text: What if I can’t sing ABC and the other kids laugh at me?

blocks.text: What if I can’t sing ABC and the other kids laugh at me?

pages.text: “Then Teacher Jill will help you remember.”

blocks.text: “Then Teacher Jill will help you remember.”

pages.text: What if I’m scared of going to the dentist tomorrow?

blocks.text: What if I’m scared of going to the dentist tomorrow?

pages.text: “I will be right there holding your hand.” Everybody gets scared. Mama says it’s okay.

blocks.text: “I will be right there holding your hand.”
Everybody gets scared. Mama says it’s okay.
